reviews.review_description:
E McNeill changed my life by making Ironstrike. I’ve played Ironstrike almost every day for 20 years. My wife left me and took the kids because I missed the birth of our child to keep my streak and get my daily 3 gems. It may sound sad to you, but I feel very happy, I didn’t want the kid anyway. I also don’t miss my wife because I’ve found my soulmate through Ironstrike, Nym. 

All jokes aside, Ironstrike is one of my favorite games. I play it on the weekends with my friends and we always have a blast. It’s annoying to see people leaving reviews about how the game is too hard for them. Get better, skill issue. I can tell that the developers work really hard and I enjoy every update. Some things could be improved and I would love more content, but I appreciate all the work the devs put in to making such a fun game.

This game is amazing, and is very replayable. However, there are a few problems, and things you could add to make it 5 stars. 

1. If you accidentally uninstall the game, you lose everything. 

2. EVERYONE keeps disconnecting. 

3. Not enough weapons. 

4. When a host leaves, the game is over. You should make someone else be the host. 

Add-ons: 
Stats to see basically how much you’ve played, and also to know how many times you’ve won.

Visible levels for weapons. When you play a game, the weapon your using can level up by getting exp 
somehow. 

Thanks for reading this review. If you could please add some stuff, and fix some things from this list, that would be amazing!

Don’t get me wrong but I absolutely love and adore this game but the combat just doesn’t feel dynamic and it just get repetitive and boring. I would love if E. McNeill would add some new maps, mechanics, weapons, and 
more upgrade to the player mechanics like for example: when host leaves it make someone else the host, but what if you add more game modes like with more player and new enemies. This is a solid game but some improvements can be made. Would buy again.😀👍

1. Weapon mixing (example: Mrymdion spear’s shield + Aeonic greatsword)
2. Grip settings (example: being able to hold weapons like the Vhassic katana the way the assassin boss does)
3. Multi-classing (example: using fireballs as a melee)
4. Aeon mode (being able to spawn any enemy, including bosses, creating your own map, rename your creations and save them, players will get 3 free save slots, and have to pay 30 animus to get more, basically a sandbox mode)
5. Influence enemies (example: you ran out of revives and died, you can take control of an enemy, except Archons, and continue fighting)

Iron strike is a great game but whenever the host leaves the whole silver gets kicked i don't think that should be i think cuz if the internet goes out the whole internet goes out for everyone and it's just stupid so please have it to wear when one owner leave another person becomes the owner and no one gets kicked from the server add a reporting to my people say the n word five to 10 times a game

This game was very fun when I started playing it even though it had lots of screaming kids messing up the lobbies. Recently it got way worse the whole game is filled with screaming kids who won't even finish the full match sometimes i can go 8 consecutive matches that go halfway cuz the host leaves or the party members get into arguments over small things  I wish you guys could add a host migration system or a way to chose to host a match. It sucks especially if the other three are still in the match. At the moment it's unplayable for me since I can't even finish a match without the host disconnecting

I believe that ironstrike needs more weapon choices like a dagger or a sling because the more you play this game the more repetitive it gets. I understand the game is free but adding more choices would boost player count by a ton. So overall great game but could use some more weaponry.

Second though I know it probably not gonna happen cause short swords exist but can we please have the karats from iron lights they are awesome and so much fun to use ...

And lastly please keep going with the game it feels like you want to add more but don't know how ; I have an idea ; random weapon swaps mid round as an extra game mono de called chaos mode ; it could switch the type of enemy say a Brandon enemy maybe a boss mid map or something like taht ; or maybe even secret weapons taht are randomly hidden in the map it'd make exploring even more fun

Ironstrike is one of the best games I’ve ever found and played in virtual reality. Never gets old, and the updates are awesome. If I could give a recommendation on a new weapon, I’d love for daggers that instantly apply Ironstrikes to enemies they hit when thrown to be added. Just a suggestion, doesn’t need to be added.

This game is already astonishing me with the potential it has. The graphics are beautiful and the enemy gameplay is awesome, however there are some problems. Only 2 I have seen. When the host leaves everyone leaves no exceptions, that problem is frustrating because sometimes me and my friends get really far and his game crashes and we all lose our progress. The second problem I see is that the maps are too short. Its only 4 encounters until we fight a boss. Other than that the game is on the right track with improvement, from a personal note please add more weapon upgrades and skills

This game is was fun but as soon as you try a single run that is a character you didn't see someone use that one taps everything then the heavy weapons people just hit 3 time in one second wielding a 2 handed weapon with 1 hand without taking a break and dealing like 250 damage per hit and even if you block they just break your weapon and since they don't rest or get the sword say stuck in the ground they break you weapon and then kill you 2 seconds later. Not to mention the melee bosses that have weapons that are so durable you just have to wildly swing making it not even skill based. Now say you get good enough they hit UNDERNEATH you where it's nearly impossible to block without quarterstaff but quarterstaff breaks so dang easily. The other classes are easier to play but it's nearly impossible to stay hitless without clipping through the ground which is something you can do btw. And if you get haste for mage (the melee tankish looking ones can catch up talk about unfair)or slow fall or Lightfoot on archer the homing missiles just seek you out dealing 50 damage a hit and are nearly undogeable especially if you are and archer with no way to block without wasting one of your difficult to get arrows cause the horrible reload times.

Alright now we highlighted the problems let's address how to fix these

1. ADD MORE UPGRADES TO REC A FOR ECHOS. If you could just get. 3 starting skills more HP regen of higher enhanced chance this would fix a great deal of problems. But that might seem to op and only archon runs ok take a look at #2

2. Add more ways to stun say if you got a headshot then the event takes double damage and gets a 3 second stun for both archer and mage.

3. We have helped archer and mage now make the non ironstrike damage scale with combo show damage you do without hitting iron strikes and why on earth can a mage be tankier than a melee add in like mettle as a PERMANENT SKILL THAT LEVELS WITH BOSS KILLS this will help with all those 2 handed weapon enemys swinging inhumanly fast

4. Simple and works just remove the mace and great sword that enemies can use or just all the melee mini dudes with their shoulder pad armor that have like a great sword or mace that swing so fast 

5. Just add more classes and content to make the player stronger because we only seem to get new armor enemies and weapons. If I'm being honest the only 3 melee weapons I use are the hammer the great sword shield or the big glave/quarterstaff I'm not gonna use the new crescent axis blade or whatnot so because of that hear are some skill and weapons that people would actually like

New skills or weapons.   Before this starts add weapon specific skills or pristine weapons that deal like 1.5x damage(enhanced weapons)

1. Mage: weapons: Add a ball that enhanced orb to make it even more mana. 
Spells:
Time magic  Retry is an enchantment that has a 30 second cool down costing 50 mana for the next 7(+5 per level) seconds each hit on you had a 20%(+10 per level) to reflect back to the enemy.
                      Rewind rewind your health and position to 20 seconds ago(just tracer from overwatch) 50 second cool down(-10 per level)

2. Ranger: weapon: headhunter (requires new game mechanic the headshots described earlier) 20 base damage .7 arrow/sec if a headshot is hit their is a 15% to deal 1000 damage can only be triggered every 15 seconds because power 15%(only 1 chance where as sweet arrow can have technically infinite)
Skills: In technique gives the skill snipe with headhunter each level gives +10% for the 1000 damage and -3 sec cool down 
Another skill in infusions: sweet arrow: makes the enemy run faster (+50%)but each meter they travel they take 100 damage lasting 2 secs and can only trigger every 10 seconds(+75 damage a level -3 cool down and +.5 duration) because of the power has a 3% drop rate

4. Melee: Weapon:5% rate and called the overturner like hear hunter has a special kill ability where if you deal over 400 damage on the last hit you heal 75 HP can only trigger 3 times a round. Deals 250x1 and is a Rapier that has medium speed. Because of the power it has +50% damage taken and removed round healing besides the fortitude healing
Skills: Fortitude turn over pairs with the overturner and adds +1  triggers per round/pylon however the enhanced would only add 1 heal at level 3 but instead of healing 50 you would max out at 100
Another skill in might (8%) called uppercut: when you charge up the attack button you can drop you weapon and uppercut you enemy for a max of 250 damage(+25 per second) 7 second cool down 


1 more thing add a way to report people far to many 10 year olds cussing that people don't want to listen to

I think that is all if devs see this the big takeaway is you need to nerf your melee character or buff your players hopefully these ideas helped

I think that some of the class’s abilities are really confusing for beginners like me. So I think all classes should get their very own tutorials so beginners could have a lot more of an understanding of the classes. But over all extremely fun game.

reviews.review_title: Stuff that needs to be added
reviews.review_description: The game needs to have a new weapon that could be a chain with a blade attached to it and it could upgrade to be nunchucks or a mace or something. They also need to add public lobbies with codes so you can play public but still have your friend playing with you. They also need to add glowing armor

This game I peak when it comes to medieval combat combined with fantasy elements I enjoy the weapon selection mainly melee and enjoy playing with heavy weapons. I most often play by myself because I’m not sure if it’s on my end or not but I keep getting booted from the game during combat and it says the host disconnected from the game, but back to the good stuff like the enemies I love the variety groups of mages are my favorite to go against because I often get deflect. I also like how the game was designed to be played over and over again replayability is a key factor when it comes to a good game. Also i was going to suggest making pvp like iron lights but without slow motion and make enemies spawnable within the hub. I can’t cover much more but overall this is an awesome game that has become one of my favorites as someone who’s played since the aeon update I’ve seen this game grow and continue to enjoy thank you emc Neil. 😁 update: I had an idea of making more difficult enemies  with new ideas such as : new enemies pink rank stronger than purple and blue that has more damage and health along with for enemies that heal others their healing heals faster. Next up white rank here enemies would be as powerful as the players but faster also make a new enemy type  that can use bows like players and new mages that use wands and can use the spells we have . And finally black enemy rank can nearly one shot you even with max toughness and are extremely smart and can perform fake outs i don’t have many ideas left but my final one  endless runs for both archon and normal runs so the new enemy types I listed can have inclusion also please allow access to endless mode without it being archon runs

Its a relly good game i has a few bugs but they arent game breaking and pretty small. One problem i do have is that i feel like there coud be more weapons. Or like more starting weapons like fists or gauntlets or maybe a whip like in ironlights. But apart from these things this game is one of my favorite games. I highly recommend at least trying ironstrike.

Ever since I got this game, I’ve loved it! The combat system is unique enough to feel fresh, and deep enough to offer a multitude of strategies and paths, but not in any way hard to grasp at a basic level. The physics are realistic, the upgrades keep each game interesting, and the environment - stunning to say the least! I also enjoy how the game is story driven, but not to the point where it becomes restrictive.
Ironstrike also has more of a slow-burn type of progression, so I always felt like there was something to get better at and work forward to. The players in Ironstrike are also pretty chill, and the community is great!
Overall, I would recommend this game to anyone who enjoys cooperative combat games, as well as anyone who is willing to try something new!

reviews.review_title: Literally the perfect game for me
reviews.review_description: I’ve been playing since September 2025 and I can’t really say I’ve had a bad experience with the game it’s really fun to play with a group of close friends or just public servers the combat was carefully made and I like how the only thing you can buy is gems for cosmetics and upgrades but even if you don’t want to spend any money they still give you a way to get gems for free just nice to finally see a game that doesn’t make you spend $30 just for one exclusive overpowered weapon this game was truly made with love and that’s what keeps me constantly coming back to it :)

reviews.review_title: Why you should play iron strike
reviews.review_description: I love iron strike it’s not about the skill of your team it’s about having a good time with all the people you meet along the way because me playing iron strike made me find my true love and bff I love the hard work that put into the game and I love all the new updates.

The game is very  fun and super satisfying. It genuinely makes you feel so tough it’s crazy. The fighting mechanics are spot on and it isn’t repetitive. Also the NPCs unlike most pvp games are not repetitive and are fast. The game overall is super satisfying and the community is pretty good. Overall 8.4/10.

Ironstrike is a top game easily in top 5 oat but sometimes it can be hard when there are less players and this can be due boredom so you may want to add more weapon choices so it isn’t so repetitive. Some complain and say it is too hard but that is because they are not good and need more skill coms and good teammates i almost play everyday and when i do i normally run duos with a friend and we always lose at the end to the boss but we are so close i say if more options are added then we can beat it as then more people will want to play ironstrike but overall ironstrike is a great game and i highly recommend it.

I found this game about two weeks ago and I got hooked, the mechanics are awesome and how the lobbies work is really smart, it might seem silly but the small details matter in a game! The game can be a little tough sometimes but I personally like the challenge. I highly recommend this game and whoever's reading this have a nice day!

This game is absolutely incredible. I have just one idea to improve it that is out of the ordinary. The whole point of the game is to give the aeons more power via animus. They need this power to return sentient life to the world. What if they did just that. What if, after obtaining a certain amount of animus, the aeons grow strong enough to create people. This would be a perfect opportunity to merge ironstrike and ironlights. Players could choose to fight the archons with their friends, or battle other players in coliseums within cities made by the newly returned people, maybe even protect the cities from the archons. This would be a great way to bring back ironlights which has a significantly smaller amount of people playing it. In my region, for example, I can't even play online for lack of people. This way, people could experience both open area combat, and one on one (or maybe even two on two) dueling combat. You could even make it so that people in the arena could move around the entire giant platform given to them rather than the small circle. This is just an idea, both ironstrike and ironlights are great games regardless, I would highly recommend both of them.

This game is the only reason that I actually play vr this game is so fun and the only one I play although some things should be changed like more tekka upgrades but costing way more and a more efficient way to get green gems although there is some bad things about this game I could write an entire essay on why this game is good I suggest you play this

reviews.review_title: I don't know what to put here
reviews.review_description: Great game but would be even better with a sandbox mode where we could select from all the perks and weapons so we could plan out our builds

hi I’m peanutbutter, and I’m gonna yap about ironstrike, first of all The graphics are great, your armor literally shines, the maps are stunning and the variations of weapons and abilitys you can earn is insane, from as small as a nymphian to the strength of the grand cudgel.  From  dealing more damage to armor to one shot an enemy with rage, and the owner is pretty kind, I am dead serious when I say this, I met the owner in a game, and he was literally so chill, all he asked me for was any ideas for the game, also the lore for this game is peak, like the aeons have thousands of lines, talking from endlai and archons to their goals for rejuvenateing the land. And don’t get me started on the gameplay,  the movements are so smooth, and the weapons have actual wheight to them, if you hone a strong weapon it usually is hard to hold with  one hand so you have to use two, or something with small damage is super easy to control, oh by the way there are diffrent weapons than just swords, like you can be a mage or an archer or a knight, and also the enemy’s you fight use motion tracking from the developers so the enemy’s attacks are so smooth, there are also diffrent types of enemies too I won’t spoil them though because I want you to learn when you play, you can also play with friends, or in a public lobby, or just be solo  overall the game is perfect, the lore the gameplay, the weight of your sword, the owner and the realism is almost perfect, I recommend this game for fantasy lovers and people who like combat.

I love everything about the game. Combat is perfect and almost everything else. I only have some semi problems:

1. The bosses have an insane wielding speed, PLEASE slow them down

2. When you upgrade the wand to a staff, it promises melee damage but it doesn’t do any damage whatsoever. It does 0 damage a hit.

3. PLEASE nerf some of the mage variants

4. Make the spell casting a little easier, it takes wayyyyyyy to long to cast a simple for example, spark spell

I think there should be more weapons like long sword, rapier, halberd, a rapid fire crossbow designed after the one from china, and a Viking axe. PLS

I just randomly found this when I was bored and instantly loved it. 10/10

The game is honestly top tier. Getting to try out different variants of abilities and making different builds is so fun.  You can experiment to find out what works best for you.
 It would be nice to have a few more variations in abilities.  Also, in endless mode, I think when we max out all our skills we should be able to pick another three of each so that we can keep getting stronger.
Also, I really wish that you can make private lobbies public.  Maybe so you could get your friends to join, then open it to get more random players.  I'd also recommend an added, separate version of the normal run.  One that's the same, but has 8 levels instead of only 4, so that you can level your abilities more and get a better grasp of your build without going into an archon run just for endless mode.  Maybe like an Extended Run or something.
It’s honestly a amazing game

reviews.review_title: Honestly the best and realistic rpg
reviews.review_description: It has alot of enemies even tho the bosses are hard it's all apart of the lore I love the storyline and it's unique style it's the best
Thank you i play this game too much so my mom sent me to the adoption center and I am happy imso. My mom said if i keep playing shelll throw my he

First of all I think the game doesn't have major balance Issues it seems fine to me, the new endless mode is also very well done and is fun to play. All Weapons are very satisfying to use and feel well thought out.

But I hope that in the future there will be more use cases for the shards. You can max everything pretty fast. Also I hope there will be Forever lasting Upgrades to each weapon so that you can specialize a bit more and make your main weapon truly feel individual.

But at the moment I would call this game the best free game in the Store and I am really happy that the devs Update it regularly.

I actually adore this game, most of the melee weapons feel great (two handed ones are a bit off but you can get used to them fairly easily), the mechanics are relatively well executed, and the many different build combinations make it very replayable. I've only been playing it for about a week at this point, so it may start getting stale for me soon, but so far it's just as fun as when I started. The main thing I think the game needs is more progression, or a separate mode with it's own infinite (diminishing returns) upgrades, specifically because the main currency is near useless once you've finished your upgrades. Overall, definitely recommend at least trying, it's one of those games that even if you get tired of it, you'll come back occasionally and get lost in it for your whole session.

I like this game but the only I don't like about the game is that when you are done with a run you mostly get 1 gem, I say we get 5+ gems so we don't have those boring outfits.

 Another thing that I don't like about iron strike is that the weapons keep breaking on easy enemy's that are in the boss rounds.

 The third thing that I don't like is that they didn't replace the bow (not the crossbow) with another weapon that can do way more (no one uses it) just replace it with a melee weapon so you can nvm, just replace the spear too you barley do any damage.

 And fix the Wi-Fi problem because when you are in a run the host (or you) randomly gets their WiFi cut off so the run just stops so FIX THESE BUGS!

Multiplayer is pissing me off so much. There are SO MANY times where a host just disconnects out of nowhere, and USUALLY it's when things are finally getting good, and then BOOP. Host disconnects and everything ends. I sign in mostly to keep the daily streak and collect the cosmetics, but sometimes, I'll go through maybe two to FIVE games where we don't finish because the host disconnects and all were for naught. Seriously, IT NEEDS FIXING.

Ironstrike is a fantasy style combat game. With plenty of weapons, upgrades, fighting styles, and worthy foes that will try to knock you down. With no lag, gore, and fear holding you back, you’ll have the best time your ever gotten. (Note for the devs: Could you please make the game more energy efficient?
The game is fun 'nough said

I enjoy playing this game. It's really fun, combat is cool, the magic is well developed, fun upgrades and cool cosmetics. The only reason I gave this 4 star is because whenever the host leaves, we all get kicked. It's really annoying because sometimes trolls start a game and quit immediately after, wasting my headset battery and time. Please remove that.

Absolute blast! Weapon physics are great, community is funny, and it gets really strategic. Always someone helping out the newer players, and no blood or gore! Great armor, though the green gem progression is slow, but it’s just cosmetics. Looking forward to updates!

Edit: these devs know their community!

reviews.review_title: It's fun but needs more weapon choices

Also, I feel like black powder weapons would be a cool addition to the game, but it doesn't really matter because the ranged weapons we already have are amazing and never get old. This review is for people who play this game long term

You can Co op with your friends (I co op almost everyday) My only complaint is that the two handed weapons are difficult to use but other than that, the best game I have. This game is the best VR game ever created, I frequently cry tears of joy when each update finally arrives. E McNeil is my hero, I have posters of him in my room. The pure amount of dopamine I get from seeing this game on my apps is indescribable. Play this game.

reviews.review_title: It’s way too hard on endless
reviews.review_description: Don’t get me wrong but endless is a good way to test your true skill and capabilities, but you shouldn’t have to beat the archons to get to endless because you can only make it so far before your oculus dies. So after you beat the archons twice you should be able to just play endless through a server like normal runs and archon runs. Also for world three on endless mode normal enemies that spawn everywhere don’t have to do 600 damage for one hit and 200 damage for a single magic orb that they shoot many of.Please make endless easier to get access to and nerf the world three enemies.
tufffffff
They made it free which means everyone who bought it lost money and all the gorilla tag kids ruined the experience
whenever we try to join a code we join different lobbies

This game is very fun and detailed the pay to win gives very good value but I have some suggestions I think you should be able to buy geodes and echos and I also think there should be an algorithm that tracks which weapon you try to get when you can and it's gives you that same weapon more often I also think that next update should also add boss music for every boss in the game 10/10

I don't feel like writing that long of a review cus I'm not tired but this is game is really well made and even though its hard once you get the hang of it and learn how to play it's pretty fun afterwards👍 good game only there's a lot of people complaining its too difficult cus they are under the age of ten and dont understand how the game works

GAME

The game is extremely fun! I like the style, I meet new people every day. Archon/Endless runs may be difficult (especially the 20 mages) but it makes the game more chaotic and fun! Aeon designs are really cool.

IDEAS

gauntlets.
One of the highest quality vr games out there AND ITS FREE!

The game is well developed, good graphics, the enemies are a little bit too fast and it’s difficult to put distance between you and them if you have a ranged weapon. But all in all I think it’s a good co-op game, the difficulty increases if there are more players by sending in more enemies and I really like that aspect
